getMainSoundContext.description: Returns the engine's main sound context. The main context will always have a listener position of 0,0,0. Will return null if the engine's sound functions are not enabled.

SoundContext.description: A class for playing sound. Each sound context represents it's own 3D scene, with it's own reverb and sound parameters.

playSound.description: Plays a 2D sound, without any attenuation or panning.

arguments.volume: The sound volume, where a value of 1 is how the volume was defined in the sound file.
arguments.pitch: The sound pitch, where a value of 1 is normal pitch.

playSoundAt.description: Plays a 3D sound, with attenuation and panning depending on where the listener is in the scene's 3D space.

arguments.volume: The sound volume, where a value of 1 is how the volume was defined in the sound file.
arguments.pitch: The sound pitch, where a value of 1 is normal pitch.
arguments.position: The position in 3D space where the sound should be played.
arguments.range: The range of the sound in units.
